name: ketch
description: Plugins for ketch — a stateless CLI for web search, OSS code search, library docs, scraping, and crawling.

plugins.name: ketch
plugins.description: Optional Claude Code integration for the ketch CLI: wires up the `ketch mcp serve` MCP server (search, code, docs, scrape, crawl) and installs the bundled ketch research skill. Requires the ketch binary >= v0.10.0 on PATH: brew install 1broseidon/tap/ketch or go install github.com/1broseidon/ketch@latest.
